summary: Build W13 COMPLETE — all six sessions banked: 5K TT 23:23 Mon (Tier C locked sub-21:30), Hyp A Tue (incline 150 landed, 155 next), T 4x6 Wed (treadmill sub, RPE 7 across), VO2 debut Fri (I validated at the slow end), Hyp B Sat (row 80 + calf 355 landed, pushdown hold cleared), long Sun (60 min treadmill @ 10:31, no pain reported = clean by default incl. the Adj #185 Achilles recheck). Logging default changed 7-19: assume-same-as-last, no-news-is-clean (Adj #188). W14 opens Mon 7-20 — easy + hill strides (Adj #167); bump slate Tue: incline 155, pushdown 27.5 pain-gated. The W14 test decides the calendar placement (Adj #167) and arbitrates T (Adj #166).

days.note: Logged — 23:23 @ 7:32/mi avg, road, 85°F, fed, Vomero Plus; HR 189 avg / 193 peak (MHR relock 193, Adj #165); cadence 173; full WU incl. 4x20 s strides; no pain anywhere. TIER C LOCKED — sub-21:30 (Adj #164). T holds 7:50-7:55 (Adj #166).

days.session: Hyp A — incline 150 debut + Build scheme
days.note: Logged — incline 150×5 RIR 3 BUMP LANDED + AMRAP 135×12 (e1RM ~189, TM 168 stands) → 155 next Tue (Adj #168); preacher 70 LANDED 10/10/10/8 (Adj #170); DB lat 30 hold, tightest mid-block (Adj #169); pushdown 25 hold, set 3 best-yet 11 (Adj #171); crunch +10 10/10/6 rebuild continues (Adj #172); rear-delt opener drifted RIR 4 — hold (Adj #173). Fed; SI + all tendons clean AM/during/post; elbow clean 4th straight.

Logged — treadmill sub for AQI 128 (0% incline): 4x6 min @ 7:56 set pace, 90 s rec, RPE 7 across = 6th straight T at RPE ≤7 (Adj #166/#177); §11.C green; fed; SI + tendons clean AM/during/post; HR display-only 168-184 (Adj #175). Future treadmill quality at 1% (Adj #177).

days.session: Off — mobility / walk, daily SI prehab
VO2max 5×3 min @ I (3 min jog rec) — first of the cycle
days.note: Logged — reps 1-4 @ 7:20, rep 5 pushed ~7:00 (off-band closer); 3 min jog rec; RPE 9 = on-anchor → I validated at the slow end (Adj #166/#178); cadence 175; HR display-only 180 avg / 192 peak (Adj #175); road, Vomero Plus; WU 1 mi, CD 15 min; fed; §11.C green; no pain anywhere AM/during/post.

days.session: Hyp B — long run punted to Sun 7-19
days.note: Logged — row 75→80 LANDED 10/9/8 RIR 1/0/0 (Adj #180); calf 355 LANDED through the AM gate 4×12 RIR 1/0/0/0, zero back-half headroom (Adj #185); pushdown hold-until-clean SATISFIED 12/12/12/8 → 27.5 pain-gated W14 Tue (Adj #183); chest fly rested re-read — 130 confirmed 12/12 RIR 3/3 (Adj #186); lat 165 first clean read 8/8/8/6, gate not met (Adj #179); DB lat rebuild flat (Adj #181); preacher 12/12/11/9 hold (Adj #182); crunch 12/10/7 — set 3 the only gap (Adj #184). Fed; all pain clean AM/PM; elbow clean 5th straight.

days.session: Long run 60 min Z1 (punted from Sat) + daily SI prehab
days.note: Logged — 60 min treadmill @ 10:31/mi avg, 0.5% incline, ~5.7 mi; slow edge of the 9:15-10:30 band = honest easy; no pain reported = clean by default incl. the Adj #185 Achilles recheck (Adj #188/#189). W13 complete.
